states.label: Behavioral Q1
states.agent_instruction: Welcome to the interview! I'll start by asking you a few behavioral questions before we move on to the technical challenges. Tell me about your background and what motivates you.

categories.label: Clarity
categories.description: How clearly and coherently the candidate articulates their background and motivations.

categories.label: Relevance
categories.description: How relevant the response is to the question asked.

categories.label: Depth
categories.description: The depth of insight, self-awareness, and thoughtfulness in the response.

states.label: Behavioral Q2
states.agent_instruction: Describe a challenging technical problem you solved. Walk me through your approach and the outcome.

categories.label: Clarity
categories.description: How clearly the candidate explains the technical problem and solution.

categories.label: Relevance
categories.description: How relevant the example is to the question and the role.

categories.label: Depth
categories.description: Technical depth of the explanation and problem-solving approach.

states.label: Behavioral Q3
states.agent_instruction: Tell me about a time you collaborated through a conflict. How did you handle the disagreement and what was the outcome?

categories.label: Clarity
categories.description: How clearly the candidate articulates the conflict and their role in resolving it.

categories.label: Relevance
categories.description: How relevant the example is to collaboration and conflict resolution.

categories.label: Depth
categories.description: Depth of insight into team dynamics, communication, and resolution strategies.

states.label: Technical Challenge 1
states.agent_instruction: Present the first coding challenge to the candidate.

states.label: Technical Challenge 2
states.agent_instruction: Present the second coding challenge to the candidate.

states.label: Technical Submission Review
states.agent_instruction: Review the submitted code submissions and proceed with evaluation.
